problem_statement: Design a bounded, reproducible evaluation for API migration regression testing.
scope: Offline, small-scale evaluation of API migration regression testing; no production deployment.
research_questions: Which evidence supports the evaluation design for API migration regression testing?
Which controlled comparison isolates the main failure mode?

evidence_gaps.description: Verifiable evidence for API migration regression testing.
A controlled evaluation using regression pass rate.

search_queries.query: API migration regression testing evaluation evidence
API migration regression testing controlled comparison regression pass rate

success_criteria: All claims bind to accepted evidence
The primary metric is regression pass rate
risks: Small samples may produce unstable estimates
